text: LEBANON ESCALATION: Israel kills 23 across Lebanon in single day — 3 drone strikes near Beirut (4 dead), Saksakiyeh airstrike (7 dead incl girl), Bourj Rahhal (3 dead), Maifadoun (1 dead). IDF struck 85+ Hezbollah sites in 24 hrs. Issued evacuation warnings for 9 villages. Biggest single-day toll since mid-April.
verificationNote: PBS, Al-Monitor, Washington Times confirmed fatalities. Lebanese Health Ministry official figures.

text: HEZBOLLAH CEASEFIRE COLLAPSE: Hezbollah claimed 26 attacks Friday including 2 cross-border strikes INTO Israel — first since April 17 ceasefire. Explosive drones hit Mt. Meron air traffic control base — 3 IDF reservists wounded (1 seriously). IDF retaliating with 85+ site strikes. Lebanon ceasefire set to expire May 17.
verificationNote: Times of Israel and Haaretz confirmed IDF casualties. Hezbollah claimed responsibility.

text: IRGC THREAT ESCALATION: IRGC Naval Command warns 'heavy assault against one of the American centers in the region' if US continues tanker strikes. IRGC Aerospace: 'missiles and drones are locked onto the enemy.' Comes after US F/A-18s disabled Sea Star III and Sevda by bombing their smokestacks.
verificationNote: CNN confirmed IRGC threats. CNBC confirmed tanker strikes.

text: RUSSIA-IRAN RESUPPLY: NYT reports Russia shipping drone components to Iran via Caspian Sea — bypassing Hormuz blockade. Iran lost 60% of drone arsenal. Ships turning off AIS transponders. Also sending wheat, corn, sunflower oil through 4 Caspian ports. Iran rebuilding military capability while under blockade.
verificationNote: NYT report citing US officials. Confirmed by Times of Israel and Iran International.

text: ECONOMIC SNAPSHOT: Consumer sentiment crashes to 48.2 — lowest since 1952. S&P 500 paradoxically hits record 7,399. Brent $101.73 (+27.4%), WTI $95.00 (+25.8%). Gas $4.53. US sanctions 11 entities + 3 individuals (China, Belarus, UAE) for enabling Iranian weapons programs. 45 sq km oil spill detected at Kharg Island.
verificationNote: CNBC confirmed consumer sentiment and sanctions. AAA confirmed gas prices. Anadolu Agency confirmed oil spill.

text: UK HORMUZ MISSION: HMS Dragon (Type 45 destroyer) redeployed from eastern Med to Gulf for UK/France-led multinational Hormuz escort mission. ~40 nations involved. France moved carrier Charles de Gaulle to Red Sea. Strictly defensive — escort commercial shipping once hostilities subside. Blockade Day 69, zero transits since May 4.
verificationNote: LBC, ITV News, UK Defence Journal confirmed deployment and mission scope.

text: DEAL STATUS: Trump says expecting Iran letter 'tonight' — threatens 'Project Freedom Plus' if no deal. Rubio at Vatican: 'We're expecting a response.' Araghchi claims Iran at '120% missile capacity.' CIA assessment: Iran retains 70% stockpile. Mokhber (Khamenei adviser): 'Hormuz is equivalent to an atomic bomb.' Talks continue but gap remains wide.
verificationNote: CBS, CNBC, Al Jazeera confirmed statements from all parties.
